bean_name.zh: 秘鲁 米拉弗洛雷斯庄园 瑰夏

story.zh: 来自朋友的礼物。口感风格是日式烘焙商典型的干净、优雅、清淡，对我来说body和复杂度不足。酸质明显，柑橘香气最突出，还有些洋甘菊、茶感。是一杯不错的水洗咖啡，但作为geisha来说只能算普通。
story.en: A gift from a friend. The cup has that clean, elegant, delicate style typical of Japanese roasters — for me the body and complexity fell a bit short. Acidity is pronounced, with citrus as the standout note, plus some chamomile and a tea-like quality. A solid washed coffee, but fairly ordinary as far as geishas go.

method.zh: 泰摩冰瞳 / Origami · C40 刻度 18–20 格 · 1:15 · 96°C
method.en: TIMEMORE Icicle / Origami · C40 grind, 18–20 clicks · 1:15 · 96°C

summary.zh: 仿佛一杯纤细淡雅的柑橘花茶。
summary.en: Like a delicate, elegant cup of citrus flower tea.

region.zh: 乌图库班巴，亚马逊斯，秘鲁

notes.zh: 乌图库班巴（Utcubamba）位于秘鲁北部亚马逊斯大区，地处安第斯山脉与亚马逊雨林交界的「高丛林」（Selva Alta）地带，是秘鲁近年逐渐崛起的精品咖啡产区。米拉弗洛雷斯庄园由 Manuel Rojas 与 Esther Requejo 于2002年创立，曾受咖啡锈病重创，历经多年更新修剪后于2021年起开始出产瑰夏等特殊品种。
notes.en: Utcubamba sits in Peru's northern Amazonas region, in the "Selva Alta" (high jungle) transition zone between the Andes and the Amazon rainforest — one of the country's emerging specialty coffee areas. Finca Miraflores was founded in 2002 by Manuel Rojas and Esther Requejo; after years of recovery from coffee leaf rust and a long renewal-pruning program, the farm began harvesting distinctive varietals like Geisha starting in 2021.

bean_name.zh: 哥伦比亚 里萨拉尔达 米兰庄园（四月）

story.zh: 朋友去日本旅游送的礼物，来自知名烘焙商Glitch。哥伦比亚有很多特殊处理/酵母接种增味咖啡，近年来越发受到精品咖啡烘焙商追捧，可见消费者十分买账，价格通常比传统处理法高。开袋就有很浓烈的草莓香气（正如许多哥伦比亚特殊处理一样），冲煮后也是明显的草莓和杏桃。随着温度下降，风味的类型和强度都没有改变，没有层次感，如一条直线。能理解为什么是crowd pleaser, 但不是我的菜。
story.en: A gift from a friend's trip to Japan, from the well-known roaster Glitch. Colombia produces a lot of specialty-processed / yeast-inoculated coffees, and they've been increasingly popular with specialty roasters in recent years — clearly consumers are buying in, even though these usually cost more than traditionally processed lots. The bag smelled strongly of strawberry the moment I opened it (as many Colombian specialty-process coffees do), and the brewed cup was distinctly strawberry and apricot. As it cooled, the flavour's character and intensity barely changed — flat, with no real layering, like a straight line. I get why it's a crowd pleaser, but it's not really my cup.

method.zh: 泰摩冰瞳 / Origami · 1:15 · 水温 94–96°C

summary.zh: 浓郁的草莓杏桃风味让新手也能轻易喝出「水果感」，但味道不随时间变化的「人工感」难以令我满意。
summary.en: Bold strawberry-apricot flavour that even a novice could pick out — but the flavour never evolves as it cools, and that artificial, one-note feel keeps it from winning me over.

region.zh: 佩雷拉，里萨拉尔达，哥伦比亚

notes.zh: Finca Milán 坐落于哥伦比亚里萨拉尔达省，是一座传承超过40年的咖啡庄园。现由第三代咖啡农 Julio Cesar Madrid 与其合作伙伴、处理法大师 Andres Julio Quinceno 共同经营。
notes.en: Nestled in the beautiful Risaralda Department of Colombia, Finca Milán is a coffee farm with a story stretching back over 40 years. Run by Julio Cesar Madrid, a third-generation coffee farmer, and his business partner, master processor Andres Julio Quinceno.

bean_name.zh: 哥伦比亚 威廉·赞布拉诺 粉波旁

story.zh:
品牌官网上称它为「One of our most delicious releases」，所以必须尝试。的确是一杯好的水洗粉波旁（虽然对我来说谈不上「最」），拥有标志性的明亮高酸果汁感，层次丰富。

值得一提的是磨粉时干香有很突出的番茄调，令人想起曾经流行的水洗肯尼亚风味。
story.en:
The roaster's site calls it "one of our most delicious releases", so I had to try it. It really is a good washed pink bourbon — though I wouldn't go as far as "most" — with that signature bright, high-acid juiciness and plenty of layering.

Worth noting: the dry grounds have a pronounced tomato note, which brings to mind the washed Kenyan profile that was popular a while back.

method.zh: 泰摩冰瞳 / Origami · C40 刻度 18–20 格 · 1:15 · 96°C
method.en: TIMEMORE Icicle / Origami · C40 grind, 18–20 clicks · 1:15 · 96°C

summary.zh: 多汁的粉波旁，带着一丝肯尼亚式的番茄气息。
summary.en: A juicy pink bourbon with tomato-y Kenyan feel.

region.zh: 皮塔利托，惠兰，哥伦比亚

notes.zh: 皮塔利托（Pitalito）素有「惠兰咖啡之都」之称，是哥伦比亚最大精品咖啡产区惠兰省内产量最高的市镇，火山土壤与 1350–1900 米的海拔孕育出明亮酸质与浓郁果香。粉波旁正是发源于惠兰的哥伦比亚本土品种。La Montañita 庄园由 Willyan Rojas Zambrano 与妻子 Maria Esther Lopez 共同经营，自2022年起与 Seven Seeds 建立长期合作关系。
notes.en: Pitalito is known as the "coffee capital of Huila" — the highest-producing municipality in Huila, Colombia's largest specialty coffee department. Volcanic soils and elevations of 1,350–1,900m give its coffees bright acidity and pronounced fruit. Pink Bourbon itself is a Colombian variety native to Huila. La Montañita is run by Willyan Rojas Zambrano together with his wife Maria Esther Lopez, in a long-term partnership with Seven Seeds that began in 2022.

bean_name.zh: 巴西 佩德罗·加巴拉 黄波旁

story.zh:
主要用作奶咖：香甜的焦糖奶油糖风味打头，黑巧克力般的微酸回味。

作为少见的巴西黄波旁品种，值得一试。
story.en:
Mostly drunk as a milk coffee — sweet butterscotch up front, with a dark-chocolate, faintly tart finish.

A rare Brazilian Yellow Bourbon, well worth a try.

method.zh: Baratza 878 · 18g 粉 → 约 36g 出液 · 30 秒

summary.zh: 宛如一杯液体焦糖奶油糖，甜美低酸。
summary.en: Like a glass of liquid butterscotch — sweet and low in acidity.

region.zh: Campos das Vertentes，米纳斯吉拉斯，巴西
region.en: Campos das Vertentes, Minas Gerais, Brazil

notes.zh: Campos das Vertentes 位于巴西米纳斯吉拉斯州南部，是巴西传统的精品咖啡产区，以稳定的甜感与醇厚口感著称。
notes.en: Campos das Vertentes, in the south of Minas Gerais, Brazil, is one of the country's traditional specialty-coffee regions — known for dependable sweetness and a full body.

bean_name.zh: 哥伦比亚 路易斯·阿尼巴尔 帕帕约

story.zh:
磨粉后干香就有很强烈的甜香，冲煮后入口即有强烈甜感。

在口腔中呈现奶油般饱满丝滑的质地，温度下降后泛出莓果的微酸，尾韵持久，整体十分愉悦。
story.en:
Even the dry grounds smell intensely sweet, and that sweetness lands the instant it touches your lips.

The body is full and silky — almost creamy. As it cools a gentle berry tartness emerges and the finish lingers. A thoroughly delightful cup.

method.zh: 泰摩冰瞳 / Origami · 1:16（烘焙 6 周内），1:15（6 周后）· 96°C
method.en: TIMEMORE Icicle / Origami · 1:16 (within 6 wks of roast), 1:15 (after) · 96°C

summary.zh: 成熟水果的甜，奶油般饱满顺滑的口感，可可般的尾韵。
summary.en: Ripe-fruit sweetness with a full, creamy mouthfeel, coco finish.

region.zh: 阿塞韦多，惠兰，哥伦比亚

notes.zh: 阿塞韦多（Acevedo）位于哥伦比亚南部的惠兰省，高海拔加上火山土壤，是公认的精品微产区，出产的咖啡以明亮甜感与饱满果味著称。
notes.en: Acevedo, in the southern Huila department of Colombia, is a celebrated specialty micro-region — high altitude and volcanic soils give its coffees bright sweetness and full fruit.
